updates.title: Lower Prices & More Items
updates.description: All shop items now have much lower prices (starting from 10 streaks). We've also added new skins like Ninja, Space, and Viking!

updates.title: Categorized Shop
updates.description: The shop is now organized into Power-Ups and Mascot Styles, with a new Featured Deal section.

updates.title: Customizable Challenge Goals
updates.description: Pro users can now set their own daily challenge count goal (from 3 up to 20) in the settings menu.

updates.title: Enhanced Pro Section
updates.description: Clearer descriptions of Pro benefits and subscription plans (Weekly, Monthly, Yearly) to help you choose the best fit.

updates.title: Improved Goal Adjusters
updates.description: Redesigned goal sliders in settings for a smoother experience.

updates.title: Smarter Mascot AI
updates.description: Your companion now provides more relevant advice based on your current progress and goals.
